UDKGame.ini.info: Primary Renegade X game settings. The parameter boxes write the common values at startup, and this file remains editable for advanced tuning.

UDKEngine.ini.info: Network, Steam/query, and custom-content download settings.

UDKRenegadeX.ini.info: Renegade X-specific gameplay, voting, bot, RCON, and server-list settings.

UDKWeb.ini.info: Optional Renegade X web server settings. ServerName uses the GSA game-server list name and ListenPort uses GSA's automatically assigned other port.

map.name: Starting Map
map.info: Starting map without .udk. Use a CNC map for CnC, AOW, or Marathon; use DEF-DarkNight or DEF-HillSide for Survival.

map_rotation.name: Map Rotation
map_rotation.info: Comma-separated map names without .udk. Use only maps for the chosen game mode.

mutators.name: Mutators
mutators.info: Comma-separated mutator classes. Leave blank for none.

server_payload_urls.name: Server Payload URLs
server_payload_urls.info: Recovery URLs for the core runtime payload. The image normally seeds it without downloading.

refresh_server_payload.name: Refresh Server Payload
refresh_server_payload.info: Off uses the cached runtime. On redownloads and reinstalls the payload at next start.

install_optional_map_pack_one.name: Install Optional Map Pack 1
install_optional_map_pack_one.info: Downloads the first optional map pack.

install_optional_map_pack_two.name: Install Optional Map Pack 2
install_optional_map_pack_two.info: Downloads the second optional map pack.

install_optional_map_pack_three.name: Install Optional Map Pack 3
install_optional_map_pack_three.info: Downloads the third optional map pack.

optional_map_pack_one_url.name: Optional Map Pack 1 URL
optional_map_pack_one_url.info: Public archive URL used when Map Pack 1 is enabled.

optional_map_pack_two_url.name: Optional Map Pack 2 URL
optional_map_pack_two_url.info: Public archive URL used when Map Pack 2 is enabled.

optional_map_pack_three_url.name: Optional Map Pack 3 URL
optional_map_pack_three_url.info: Public archive URL used when Map Pack 3 is enabled.

admin_password.name: Admin RCON Password
admin_password.info: Writes AdminPassword in UDKGame.ini. Blank leaves it unset.

server_password.name: Server Password
server_password.info: Writes GamePassword. Blank permits public joining.

listed.name: List Server
listed.info: Allows the server to appear in the browser when networking is otherwise correct.

redirect_url.name: HTTP Redirect URL
redirect_url.info: Fast custom-content download URL. Use a trailing slash.

redirect_use_compression.name: Redirect Uses Compression
redirect_use_compression.info: Enable only for a matching compressed redirect setup.

required_content_urls.name: Required Content URLs
required_content_urls.info: Semicolon-separated public URLs for mandatory extra content.

content_urls.name: Custom Content URLs
content_urls.info: Semicolon-separated public URLs for optional extra content.

refresh_content_downloads.name: Refresh Content Downloads
refresh_content_downloads.info: Redownloads custom content on next start.

web_enabled.name: Enable Web Server
web_enabled.info: Enables the optional Renegade X web server.

max_spectators.name: Max Spectators
max_spectators.info: Set 0 to effectively disable spectator slots.

admin_can_pause.name: Admins Can Pause
admin_can_pause.info: Allows admins to pause where supported.

force_respawn.name: Force Respawn
force_respawn.info: Forces respawn behavior for normal modes.

min_net_players.name: Minimum Net Players
min_net_players.info: Used only when Wait For Net Players is enabled.

use_vac.name: Use VAC
use_vac.info: Enables VAC where the Renegade X build supports it.

steam_auth_admins.name: Steam Auth Admins
steam_auth_admins.info: Uses Steam admin authentication where supported.

extra_args.name: Extra Launch Args
extra_args.info: Raw UDK launch arguments. Leave blank for normal servers.

game_class.name: Game Type
game_class.info: Choose Survival only for DEF Survival. CnC, AOW, and CnC Marathon use normal map-prefix loading; Marathon is configured with a CnC map and CnC Time Limit set to 0.
game_class.dropdown: {"CnC AOW or Marathon map default":"none","Defense Survival":"RenX_Coop.Rx_Game_Survival"}

map_cycle_class.name: Survival Map Cycle Class
map_cycle_class.info: Choose Rx Game Survival for a DEF map rotation. Leave Rx Game for CnC AOW or Marathon map rotations.

fixed_map_rotation.name: Fixed Map Rotation
fixed_map_rotation.info: Enforces the configured map rotation instead of normal map voting.

max_map_vote_size.name: Map Vote Size
max_map_vote_size.info: Number of map choices in voting.

recent_maps_to_exclude.name: Recent Maps Excluded
recent_maps_to_exclude.info: Recently played maps excluded from voting.

bots_disabled.name: Disable Bots
bots_disabled.info: Disables normal CnC AOW bots. It does not control Survival enemies.

gdi_bots.name: GDI Bot Count
gdi_bots.info: Optional CnC AOW GDI bot count. Blank uses the game default.

nod_bots.name: NOD Bot Count
nod_bots.info: Optional CnC AOW NOD bot count. Blank uses the game default.

gdi_bot_difficulty.name: GDI Bot Difficulty
gdi_bot_difficulty.info: GDI bot difficulty for CnC AOW.

nod_bot_difficulty.name: NOD Bot Difficulty
nod_bot_difficulty.info: NOD bot difficulty for CnC AOW.

gdi_attack_percent.name: GDI Attack Percent
gdi_attack_percent.info: GDI bot attack tendency for CnC AOW.

nod_attack_percent.name: NOD Attack Percent
nod_attack_percent.info: NOD bot attack tendency for CnC AOW.

initial_credits.name: Initial Credits
initial_credits.info: Starting credits for CnC AOW where supported.

cnc_time_limit.name: CnC Time Limit Minutes
cnc_time_limit.info: CnC or AOW round time in minutes. Set 0 for a CnC Marathon with no normal time limit.

dm_time_limit.name: DM Time Limit Minutes
dm_time_limit.info: Deathmatch time limit. Retained for modes that use it.
